mechanism_narrative: Lower federal funds rates reduce corporate borrowing costs and discount rates for future earnings, directly boosting equity valuations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns show no positive correlation with FEDFUNDS levels across a 5-year rolling window, or Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: A rapid increase in the unemployment rate signals deteriorating labor market conditions and impending economic contraction, triggering risk-off sentiment and negative equity returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: Positive 20-day returns occur in > 65% of instances where UNRATE rises > 0.3pp, or signal loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) during expansion phases.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous expansion in retail sales and housing starts confirms broad-based consumer demand strength, supporting corporate revenue growth and driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: Joint positive momentum in RSAFS and HOUST fails to predict positive 60-day returns in > 55% of cases, or interaction term loses statistical significance (p > 0.10) in multivariate regression.

mechanism_narrative: Rising industrial production indices reflect immediate supply-side momentum and operational efficiency, generating short-term positive price momentum in equity markets over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO momentum shows zero or negative correlation with 5-day forward returns during easing periods, or Rank IC < 0.01 over rolling 1-year windows.

mechanism_narrative: Inflation readings exceeding 325 signal persistent price pressures that force monetary authorities to maintain restrictive policy, increasing discount rates and generating negative equity returns over the subsequent month.
failure_condition: 20-day forward returns remain positive in > 60% of observations where CPIAUCSL exceeds 325, or Rank IC < 0.03 over rolling windows.

mechanism_narrative: Consistent growth in total nonfarm payrolls indicates expanding economic capacity and rising household income, supporting corporate earnings growth and driving positive equity returns over the next quarter.
failure_condition: PAYEMS growth shows no positive correlation with 60-day forward returns across a 5-year sample, or Rank IC < 0.02.

mechanism_narrative: Concurrent expansion in real GDP and retail sales confirms synchronized demand growth across production and consumption sectors, reinforcing earnings expectations and generating positive forward returns over the next month.
failure_condition: The interaction effect between GDPC1 and RSAFS loses predictive power (Rank IC < 0.03) or yields negative returns in > 50% of triggered cases during mid-cycle phases.

mechanism_narrative: Declining industrial production signals immediate supply-side contraction and weakening economic activity, triggering short-term risk aversion and negative equity returns over the following week.
failure_condition: INDPRO declines fail to predict negative 5-day returns in > 60% of cases during recovery phases, or Rank IC < 0.01 over rolling windows.
